title: Developer Experience
purpose: Make Aion approachable, well-documented, and frictionless across all consumer surfaces — library embedding, CLI operation, SDK authoring, and AI-driven development.
scope: Hello-world and advanced examples, CLI polish, error messages, payload decoding, documentation, SDK publishing, and server configuration.

decisions.title: Examples use the typed Gleam SDK
decisions.rationale: All workflow examples must use aion_flow, not raw NIFs. The SDK is the authoring surface we want developers to learn.

decisions.title: Each example is a standalone .aion package
decisions.rationale: Examples should be self-contained: their own gleam.toml, their own worker if needed, their own README. A developer should be able to copy one example and modify it.
